known_issues: Sign-in prompt incorrectly shows 'dismissed' state unexpectedly

existing_features.title: Fix the AuthPromptBar so it never displays a 'Sign in was dismissed' message unexpectedly. The bar should only show a dismissal state when the user has explicitly closed it during the current session, and must reset correctly when a new protected action is triggered.

projectName: Fix auth prompt bar showing incorrect 'dismissed' state
